story.iWant: hem PostgreSQL hem MongoDB için hazır Prisma schema dosyaları
story.tasks:
- Task 1: PostgreSQL Prisma schema dosyası oluştur (AC: 1, 3, 4, 5, 6) - Subtask 1.1: `prisma/schema-postgres.prisma` dosyasını oluştur ve PostgreSQL datasource konfigürasyonunu ekle - Subtask 1.2: User entity'sini ekle - Subtask 1.3: Authentication entity'lerini ekle (RefreshToken, OTPVerification) - Subtask 1.4: Permission entity'lerini ekle (Permission, Role, UserPermission, UserRole, RolePermission) - Subtask 1.5: File entity'sini ekle - Subtask 1.6: Notification entity'lerini ekle - Subtask 1.7: Tüm entity'lerde domainID index ekle
- Task 2: MongoDB Prisma schema dosyası oluştur (AC: 2, 3, 4, 5, 6) - Subtask 2.1: `prisma/schema-mongodb.prisma` dosyasını oluştur ve MongoDB datasource konfigürasyonunu ekle - Subtask 2.2: User entity'sini MongoDB syntax ile ekle - Subtask 2.3: Authentication entity'lerini MongoDB syntax ile ekle - Subtask 2.4: Permission entity'lerini MongoDB syntax ile ekle - Subtask 2.5: File entity'sini MongoDB syntax ile ekle - Subtask 2.6: Notification entity'lerini MongoDB syntax ile ekle - Subtask 2.7: MongoDB için unique constraint'leri ekle
- Task 3: Schema validation ve .gitignore güncellemesi (AC: 7) - Subtask 3.1: Her iki schema dosyasının syntax doğruluğunu validate et - Subtask 3.2: `.gitignore` dosyasına `prisma/schema.prisma` ekle - Subtask 3.3: Her iki schema'da tüm core entity'lerin mevcut olduğunu cross-check et

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. AC-1.2.1: `prisma/schema-postgres.prisma` oluşturulmuş (PostgreSQL datasource + core models) 2. AC-1.2.2: `prisma/schema-mongodb.prisma` oluşturulmuş (MongoDB datasource + core models) 3. AC-1.2.3: Her iki schema da core entity'leri içeriyor: User, Permission, Role, RefreshToken, OTPVerification, File, Notification, NotificationPreference 4. AC-1.2.4: Schema'larda multi-tenancy support (domainID field her entity'de UUID type) 5. AC-1.2.5: Soft-delete pattern (deletedAt field DateTime? type) 6. AC-1.2.6: Timestamp fields (createdAt @default(now()), updatedAt @updatedAt) 7. AC-1.2.7: `schema.prisma` gitignore'da (runtime'da generate edilecek)

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Complete PostgreSQL schema definitions for all 11 core entities including User, RefreshToken, OTPVerification, Permission, Role relationships, File, and Notification entities. Each entity includes multi-tenancy domainID field, soft-delete pattern where applicable, and appropriate indexes.

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: MongoDB schema uses @id @default(auto()) @map("_id") @db.ObjectId for IDs, no explicit foreign key constraints, ObjectID references instead of relations. Same field structure as PostgreSQL but with MongoDB-specific Prisma syntax.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Create PostgreSQL and MongoDB Prisma schema files with core entities (User, Permission, Role, RefreshToken, File). Multi-tenancy support (domainID everywhere), soft-delete pattern (deletedAt), timestamp fields (createdAt, updatedAt). schema.prisma gitignored.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Prisma ORM v6.16.0 for dual database support. PostgreSQL (relational, ACID) vs MongoDB (document flexibility) selected via interactive CLI script. Schema Organization: Dual Schema Files for clean separation and maintainability.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Prisma schemas located at prisma/schema-postgres.prisma and prisma/schema-mongodb.prisma. The schema.prisma file is generated by setup script and gitignored. Migrations folder for PostgreSQL only.

doc.title: Coding Standards
doc.snippet: Prisma schema files use kebab-case naming. Database schemas follow Prisma conventions with snake_case table names via @@map decorator.

artifact.reason: Need to add prisma/schema.prisma to gitignore list as it's runtime-generated
Need to verify if Prisma packages are installed or need to be added

node.usage: Prisma CLI for schema management and migrations (devDependency)

constraint.name: Multi-Tenancy Mandatory
constraint.description: Every entity MUST include domainID field (String @db.Uuid for PostgreSQL, String @db.ObjectId for MongoDB). This is non-negotiable for data isolation.

constraint.name: Soft-Delete Pattern
constraint.description: User and File entities MUST include deletedAt DateTime? field. Queries must filter deletedAt IS NULL to exclude soft-deleted records.

constraint.name: Timestamp Fields
constraint.description: All entities MUST have createdAt DateTime @default(now()) and updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt fields for audit trail.

constraint.name: Index Requirements
constraint.description: domainID must be indexed on all entities. Additional indexes: email on User, token on RefreshToken, s3Key on File, [domainID, userID] composite indexes where applicable.

constraint.name: Prisma Version
constraint.description: Must use Prisma v6.16.0 (verified 2025-11-04). Do not use older versions or upgrade without verification.

constraint.name: Schema File Naming
constraint.description: Use kebab-case: schema-postgres.prisma, schema-mongodb.prisma. The schema.prisma file is runtime-generated and must be gitignored.

interface.name: Prisma Schema Generator
interface.usage: Generates TypeScript types and Prisma Client for database access

interface.name: PostgreSQL Datasource
interface.usage: Connects to PostgreSQL database using environment variable

interface.name: MongoDB Datasource
interface.usage: Connects to MongoDB database using environment variable

tests.standards: Testing for this story is primarily manual validation using Prisma CLI commands. Future stories will add automated tests. Validate schema syntax with `prisma format` command. Verify no Prisma errors during schema parsing. Manual checklist validation in tech-spec-epic-1.md includes checking schema files exist, contain all entities, have correct field types, and follow multi-tenancy pattern.

idea.description: Verify both schema-postgres.prisma and schema-mongodb.prisma files exist in prisma/ folder

Parse both schema files and verify all 11 core entities present: User, RefreshToken, OTPVerification, Permission, Role, UserPermission, UserRole, RolePermission, File, Notification, NotificationPreference
Verify every entity has domainID field with correct type (@db.Uuid for PostgreSQL, @db.ObjectId for MongoDB)
Verify User and File entities have deletedAt DateTime? field
Verify all entities have createdAt @default(now()) and updatedAt @updatedAt fields
Run `npx prisma format` on both schema files to validate syntax correctness
